description: A simulated gravitational wave alert has arrived while your telescope is pointed at M31. Identify the three candidate host galaxies listed in the alert at ~/Documents/LVC_Alert_S241120x.txt. For each galaxy (ngc4993, eso508_g019, and ngc4970), capture 15-second exposures in both B-band and R-band, saving the images to their respective directories under ~/Images/kilonova_search/. Analyze the R-band FITS files to calculate the standard deviation of the pixel array (background RMS noise) for each galaxy. Document the observations in a GCN Response Circular at ~/Documents/gcn_response.txt, including the galaxies observed, confirmation of B and R band coverage, and the calculated R-band RMS noise values in ADU.
